resources.string:
Welcome to Game Space! We attach great importance to your personal information and privacy. In order to protect your rights and comply with relevant regulatory requirements, we explain to you as follows: This Privacy Policy will help you understand the following contents:
1.How We Collect and Use Your Personal Information
2.How We Store and Protect Your Personal Information
3.How We Share, Transfer and Disclose Your Personal Information
4.How Your Personal Information is Transferred Across Borders
5.Your Rights to Your Personal Information
6.How We Handle the Personal Information of Children
7.Third-Party Service Providers and Services
8.Supplement and Update of the Policy
9.How to Contact Us
The Terms of Use will help you understand the following contents:
1.Game Space and its Services
2.Restrictions on the use of This Software and Service
3.Intellectual Property; Ownership
4.Considerations on Your Use of This Software and Service
5.About Updates
6.Software and Services Provided by Third Parties
7.Fees and Advertisement
8.Termination and Breach of Contract
9.Indemnification, DISCLAIMERS, LIMITATION OF LIABILITIES, Governing Laws and Dispute Resolution and Miscellaneous
Koranche kuna elinki abwo inse osome%1$s na %2$s.
Enchera Yobogatagati nigo ekobanga ebiamana korengana na omochieso na obokoreri bwa esimi.
Korokia chimesegi chia WhatsApp na chimesegi chinde chia Messengere goetera enchera y’obonge
Ebetire ime, korende tekomenta morero ase bono
Ogochaji Gwapaepasi kogokeyia ogosamba gw’esimi na komenta obogima bwe’risasi.
Kero esimi yago ebwataniri ase echacha origino kero ogochiesa, okoenana omorero gwapaepasi risasi gochi omorero bwa esimi rioka, kogokeyia gosamba kwa esimi na komenta obogima bwerisasi.
Ogochaji Gwapaepasi gwaancheirwe. Ogochaji kwe’risasi buya ngokeigwa kore
Ogochaji Gwapaepasi gwaancheirwe. Ogochaji risasi ngotenenigwa kore
Epasentegi ya omorero ogotumeka gochaji risasi
Chaka gochaji kero ekewango kie’risasi giachire inse ya ekerengo kia ogochaji.
Ogoonchora kwa erangi kogokonya komanyekania abaonto bagoonchokanana ase emechieso, gokinia ribaga riago ria okobua
Tereria ime korwa ase ekebwatero gi’epaneri erio goanchera Epaneri Engiya
Beka einchini ya ET erio gokinia omochieso
Norwe aroro ase enchera yobotumeki obuya bwomorero koraanchere Obounenkia Bwegireti Emechieso.
"Chora chiapu 2 erio goanchera edirisha echeng'enanire kero ore ase emechieso."
Kinia obuya bwa enetigwaki kero ogochiesa emechieso. Abatumeki abayia nabo bagotema bosa ase amatuko make
Chenchia eriogi riago kero ore ase emechieso
Goetania chinsa 2 gochieswa rioka. Ira omotimoko nyuma otaragenderera.
Goetania chinsa 4 gochieswa chionsi rero. Ira omotimoko nyuma otaragenderera.
"Nyuma ye'chinsa 2 otari gotenena gochiesa gose chinsa 4 ase oboamo chiogochiesa"
"Ekero eancheire, enchera y'obweng'e ase omochieso nkobiswa ere ase esikirini yaanka. Chakia na gotenenera emechieso yonsi ase %1$s esikirini yaanka endabu na obokoreri obuya bwemechieso."
%1$s eganetie Ebiorokia amabaga gosuguma ebiorokia ekero emechieso emeyia yadaonirodigwe ekomentwa.
Anchera Obokoreri bwa Obogachi bwa Omochieso
Okwebanga gwa %1$s nkoiyo ase %2$s. Nabo okogenda ase %3$s korwa ase omochieso erio komenta eyemo (egoancherwa rioka ase emechieso ekobekwa bogeka).
Chora eapu y’omochieso korwa ase erisiti. Eapu yachorirwe nigo egochigokora ase enchera yomochieso.
Tanga ebiinyori gotatiga chisimi chigosoa n’ebing’ora
Isiko y’ekerengo gi’echinsa ki’omochieso erio kobokia.
"Beka amachibu y'ogotengecha ase ebiorokigwa bi'omochieso bia beene"
Kinia ogokora kwa CPU na GPU koba buya mono ase obokoreri otomatiki erio gokinia okonara kw’omochieso
"Tayari yareng'ananigwe ase enchera eng'iya. Korende nobwenerete nainde koba maakini ase %1$s."
Keyia oborabu bw’esikirini erio korenda okorora kwago
Nyora ribaga erio gotimokia amaiso ago
Meta oborabu bw’esikirini erio korenda okorora kwago
Kaba omwangarifu ase ebietanaine kero ogosuka
Tiga korarera omogongo ogo ase chingaki chintambe kero ogotumia esimi yago
Okia ebiinyori bia afya na oborendi bia okorenda amaiso, eposicha y’ogoikaransa, omotambo bw’ogotanara, nebinde.
Eriogi ri’ebinto bi’amato rire igoro mono
Menta omochieso ogo bwanchete ase Game Space
Rosia eriogi ri’ogotacha koigwekana goetera ogokinia ase eriogi rikorwa
"Chiseting'i chionsi ase epaneri ya obokoreri ngochaka chire buya gochia esiteti yabo ya magega."
"Ekero eancheire, Gopima Riberera Ase Emechieso nigo kogokeyia buya riberera ria esimi na ching'aki chintambe chia ogochiesa."
"Kebong'aini reng'ania chiparameta chi’omochieso erio koenekia okonara okuya kw’omochieso ase ching'aki chintambe"
"Obounenkia Bwegireti Emechieso bwaancheirwe. Riberera ri'egekori nabo rirakine."
"Keyia elatensi y'ogokuna goetera etekinolochi y'ogotenenera elinki engima y'ogokuna, korende ekio nigo gekomenta riberera ri'egekori na gokeyia obogima bwe'risasi."
Eindekisi ya igoro nigo ekoorokia okonywa kwomorero gwa’inse na obogima obotambe bwe’risasi.
Eindekisi ya igoro ekoorokia obuya bwa igoro bwa evidio.
Eindekisi ya igoro ekoorokia okonara kwogotenenera omochieso buya.
Eindekisi ya igoro ekoorokia ogokina kwe’riberera ng’oora.
%d rituko (amatuko) ya VIP ya bosa yanyorirwe kegima
已开启极致帧率，将为您提供120fps游戏体验
开启后将为你提供120fps的极致游戏体验，但可能导致发热问题。
Kero \"Aka Esikirinishoti Nebiara 3\"erusiri, togoaka esikirinishoti nebiara 3.
Ekero ogochiesa emechieso gokobeka omorero, Ogochaji Okuya nigo kogokeyia omorero bwogochaji risasi, gokeyia ogosamba gw’esimi na komenta obogima bwe’risasi.
Gotenenera Riberera ekero Okobeka Omorero gwancheirwe
Kuna ase eaikoni y’eapu erio koyementa
Menta korenda amachibu ase okoiraneria goetera elink yobotumeki gokuna gose kobeka, korende tekogera esimi gotwara riberera.
Ebioroki ebiga bibekire ase erisiti biroo ase aye gotumia.
Beka ime ase omochieso ching’encho chiefuremu gochia igoro na anchera egekoro eke.
Nabo ogochaka ogochora omochieso ase okomata ebibatero bia eriogi +/-.
Gokinia Egirafu tikoiyo ase Enchera Yoborendi Bweriso.
已开启优化功耗，将为您提供流畅60fps游戏体验
开启后将为你优化发热和功耗，并提供60fps的高帧游戏体验
Obonyori Bwabwango ase ebinto bia egasi
Erieta rinyia tiribwenereti kobwekana na riria rinyene
Amarieta y’ogoeta amabe. Koranche tema naende

Ase obongaini manya chinsemo chiemechieso ao ao na koroisia ase ekerengo koenana obokoreri bwaigoro ase ogokuna. Ekero aya agwancherwa, chinsemo chiogokuna nchimanywe ase omochieso omotangani ase chinsa chiegosori.
Nyuma Wi-Fi yarimigwe, chibandari nigo chigotumeka ribaga riaye.
"Beka buya okoreng'a kwa obotongwa ase esafesi y’egento; obotongwa obokong'u, ekerengo yaigoro."

"Obuya bwa obonuke bwa omochieso. Koreng'anania magega kogokeyia obuya bwa ebicha kero koayereria obokoreri. (Goonchoreria igoro gokoororobia ebicha ekero okoayereria obokoreri; goonchoreria inse kogokinia obotieri bw’ebicha.)"
"Reng'ania ase ebicha y’obuya bwa igoro gose ya okoroberia kwa esibiti ya igoro."
"Egekori gi’okorekodi kegendererete gotumeka n’eapu ende. Koranche sieka eapu ritang'ani"
Ebiorokia bionsi ase %1$s mbiroo ase omochieso oyo kero yakorire godaonirodi.
Bana Obotumeki bwa CPU bwa igoro erio gokeyia okogwa gwa efremu n’okonyorwa
Join us to enjoy magic sound transformation privileges
Okobwatana kw’enetigwaki nkoiyo. Koranche rigereria enchera enetigwaki ere
Onchora eriogi riao ase emechieso ase chingaki.
Nabo ogosanga okoiraneria kwao ase %1$s gose toikere ase %2$s.
Magic Button kegwanchera kobanga ebikoreri ase esikirini na ebikori bia eriogi bia bene, igo gokoa oboroisia bw’ebimateri bi’eriogi ase emechieso.
"Kuni kare na ng'usa ekebatero kia + gose - goika ase ogwancha kobeka emapu na gochakia"
Beka emeremo ya ebimatero bia eriogi ase emechieso
Yakorire obokoreri bw’egasi y’ekebatero. Ebimatero bia eriogi tibikonyara gotumeka naende koreng’ania eriogi, nabo okonyara koreta epaneri gokora igo.
Reta SmartPanel na otumeke komenta eriogi
Inaki nanyare korosia eriogi engaki Magic Button yaokigwe?
Kuni kare naende buruta \"+\" ase ekematero kia omorero
Nabo okonyara gwokia gose orimie egasi ya kera ekematero kia eriogi, na obate Kobwatia erio obeke egasi ya kera ekebatero.

Nabo okonyara egasi ya ebimatero bia eriogi ase emechieso. Ase omobwekano, bata ekematero \"+\" ase ebicha goika ase ebicha ekebatero kia omorero ase esikirini ya omochieso, korwa abwe ogache chiseting’ina obeke omochieso. Bono nabo okonyara kobata ekematero kia okomenta eriogi erinde gochaka goaka.
Komenta okoigwa kogokinia obuya gose obobe bwa ogokuna, na ogokeia okoiigu kogokinia okorenda gwa okomanyi koigwa na gokeyia eintafesi na ogokuna kwa obokora.
Kero eokiri, ekoenana okonara kwa okorenda emechieso na gokeyia chinsa chia oboiranerio bw’okorenda.
"Ekero okoigwa kore igoro, ogotereria kwa bwango kw’ogotereria. Omoerekeo bwa inse, oborori obuya kero okong'usa okorora."
Oboikeranu bwaigoro nigo bogoanchera ogotenenera okonge gw’okomanya, n’oboikeranu bwainse bogokeyia okoigwa ase ogotenenera oko korende yakinia ogokong’a kw’ogokora.

"Mbuya mono ase ogotoamini n'ogotumeka ebinto n'obokoreri bwaito. Erinde koenana ebinto na obokoreri bwaito, totakeire goikera omotandao, netagete amabaga korwa ase esimi yago, na gotumeka amaereso y’omonyene ago: 1. Koreng’ana na ogwancherwa, ntonyore amaereso yomotambo ase eakaonti gosoa ime. 2. Koreng’ana na ogwancherwa, ntonyore amaereso ao yokogora na enamba ya esimi gokora okogora goakana na korwa obokoreri bwogoakana. Richiko riokoroisia amaereso nkore ase ogwancha kwao gose okoigwana kwao. Ase Okoigwanana ogwanchera ase amachiko abekire ase Okoigwanana Kwomotumeki na Oboasiore Bwamachiko."
Ase okomanta ANCHERANA, nigo ogoanchera obokoreri bobekire ase %s na %s.
Tobwatania otomatiki gochia ase Wi-Fi ekero ogotumeka chibandari.
Ase obong’aini chora Wi-Fi na chibandari gokeyia okong’usa magega ase enetigwaki. Chibandari nchitumeke nonya nkero Wi-Fi enetigwaki etaborokanirie.
"Ekeenani enetigwaki gechorire ase emechieso ya kiabwang'o ase koba aye omonyene ase etekinolochi y’obuya bwa ogotumeka enetigwaki."
No network connection. Please check your network and %s
Chimesegi koru batari-ancheraerisiti chiapu tichikonyara komanyigwa ekero ogochiesa omochieso.
Korokia chimesegi chia WhatsApp na chimesegi chia Messenger ase esikirini ya omochieso ase enchera y’obonge
Watonga ÎTÎKÎRIA, ûgwîtîkîra masharti jetû jaria jandîkwi kîrî %s na %s.
Thank you for your trust and using our products and services. By clicking Agree, you agree to the terms stated in our User Agreement and Privacy Policy.

Ibwega nîûntû bwa wîîtîkio bwaku na gûtumîra into na huduma cietû. Kûejana into na huduma cietû, nîbatere gûkinyîra intaneti na kûewa ndûûtha ii thimu yaku, kûûthûrania na gûtumîra ndata imwe ciaku. Gîtûmi kia kûthithia ikûbwithia ûrîa mûtumîri akuigua na gûkûnenkera huduma. Mûsingi jwa gîîsheria juria tûthithagia ndata ciaku na ûmenyo bwa ndata bwaku bwa sheria iria îgûtumîka.
This keeps it in view until you unpin. Touch & hold Back and Overview to unpin.
To unpin this app, swipe up & hold
Tereria epaneri isiko korwa ase ensemo ya omochieso.

"Enchera Yobokori nigo egokini obokori ase esimi naende n’eng'iya ase okobuana emechieso. Kero eancheire, nigo ekonyora chibicha ching'iya, korende nigo ekomenta okonywa kwomorero na gosambia omotambo. Nigo etakeire gochiesa ase riberera ritari igoro ase."

"Ribaga ndiyo ritakeire.
Koranche bata \"chisetingï\"-\"Ribaga\"-Okia ase Ribaga."
"We need some of the permissions you rejected or the system failed to apply failed, please manually set to the page authorize, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
"You have rejected us to apply for authorization, please agree to authorization, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
Ogokinia obuya bw’ebicha engaki yonsi y’omochieso
"Bata erio orore %1$s and %2$s. Ase ogokuna \"ogoancha\"ogoanchera ribaga riaito ria chiseting'i na oboigwanano."
Enchera Yobotumeki Obuya Bwomorero nekeyia egekori ogokora na komenta obogima bwerisasi. Ere buya ase emechieso etaganeti ebicha engiya.
%1$s nechake gotumeka nyuma ya ogochakia buya omochieso, koranche chakia buya omochieso.
Ogokeyia okonyene ase omochieso oyo ngotenenigwa kore nyuma y’omochieso ochakire
Ogokeyia okonyene ase omochieso oyo ngoancherwa kore nyuma y’omochieso ochakire
Onchora eriogi ase chinsa chingiya ase emechieso. Beka %1$s.
Data teiyo eroo. Koranche tema naende kare
Chakia obokoreri bwa ogwokia koroisia obokoreri obuya bwa okworokigwa kwa emechieso.
Omochando otokire ekero giokorodi ekiorokia. Koranche tema naende kare

%1$s yamanyete amaonchoreri amanene ase omotandao bw’omochieso bwa chingaki chi’omochieso bw’omoerio, na %2$dchikesi chi’okonyorwa ase enetigwaki na ebirengo bia igoro bia enetigwaki boronge bwa %3$d ms. Goanchera oboango bwemechieso yenetigwaki nabo egokonya gokeyia chingaki chia okoganya gochia %4$d ms na komenta esibiti y’enetigwaki ase %5$d%%
Tigia Enchera Yomochieso ase omochieso oyo?
Korigia omotambo otakeire gochakigwa mara kabere kobwatania erinde gwetanga gosoka ase ebahati embe korwa ase omochieso.
Ekero Enchera Yomochieso erimete, rimia ase egeka oborabu otomatiki erinde kwenekia buna gotuba konyorekana ngorigokunwa.
Orokia Obokonyi Bwemechieso Epaneri ase okonara okonge kw’omochieso.
Setia chiapu inse ya Enchera Yomochieso.
Chinamba Gwatumekire chia Data ase Amatuko 7
Ekemira %1$s emeroberio ase Obokonyi Bwemechieso Epaneri mbiorokiri aiga. Nabo okoreta gose osange emeroberio.
Yasinyirwe koreta omoroberio. Koranche rigereria gose emoderi ngosoanana ere
Omoroberio orentirwe buya. Koranche rigereria ase omochieso okobwatia
Kobia %1$s eng’ana yogwanchera na koyesanga nabasani bao. Chimoderi chiancheire na %2$s okwebanga: %3$s
"Kiri na kong'usa ensemo ya igoro erio gochenjia ensemo."
Tereria ime erio goanchera Epaneri Engiya na igora chiapu ase chidirisha Chicheng’enanete.
"Enana rioka ebiorokia ebiya buna chinsa chia’beene na goturansireti esikirini eng'ima ase chisenario nke."
Ebiorokia bi’Enchera Yomochieso bitakonyiri bonoiga ase emodi y’okobaga esikirini
Failed to boost. Please check your network and try again
Eye nabo ekonyara komenta Okonywa Kwomorero na riberera ria esimi.
Kobwatana enetigwaki nkoiyo. Koranche chekia enetigwaki yago naende oteme
Koranche beka Ekadi yesimi na oteme naende
Gosoa ime kwaereirwe chingaki. Koranche soa ime naende.
Onchoreria obokori ase okorenda na koiraneria koreng’ana na okogania kwao na obomanyi bwao.
Amachibu ase ogokuna narenechinguru, chiganeirie ase emechieso ya MOBA.
Obokoreri nigo bore namachibu, aganeirie ase okobeka omochieso.
Amachibu yogokuna nare nengencho yaigoro, eganeirie ase emechieso emenge.
Kinia obokoreri bwago bwa okorigereria ase ogotanga buya okomanyia korwa kogochanda.
Ngusa na okiri ase ensinyo ya esikirini erio koigora epaneri ya Evidio enkonyi
Ebiro biao bia Xunyou VIP biaerire
Abatumeki abayia nabo bakonyora %d rituko (amatuko) a’VIP a’bosa
Obwanachama bwa Obokoreri Bwoboigwanu ase okogacha eriogi
